title: per-repo config
description: Values a repo exposes to parametrized skills as {{ config.KEY }}. This is the one legitimate per-repo axis (stack-specific commands + areas); everything else in a skill body is shared. Extra keys are allowed so bundles can add their own.

test_command.description: How this repo runs its test suite.

verify_command.description: How this repo builds/verifies before a PR.

areas.description: Impact/area labels used by grilling + triage skills.

commit_scopes.description: Allowed Conventional-Commit scopes for the commit skill.

id_prefix.description: Requirement-ID area prefix for spec-driven repos (e.g. AND).
